# FreelanceRateCalculator.net

> Free UK-focused freelance rate calculator with supporting pricing guides.

This site helps freelancers calculate a sustainable hourly rate and understand UK market benchmarks for different disciplines.

## Primary resources

- [Calculator & main guide](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/)
- [Privacy policy](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/privacy.html)

## Blog articles

- [Freelance Pricing & Rates Blog](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/blog/)
- [Freelance Day Rate vs Hourly Rate](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/blog/day-rate-vs-hourly-rate/)
- [Freelance Web Developer Rates UK](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/blog/freelance-web-developer-rates-uk/)
- [Freelance Graphic Designer Rates UK](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/blog/freelance-graphic-designer-rates-uk/)
- [The Freelancer's Guide to Billable Hours](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/blog/billable-hours-guide/)
- [How to Raise Your Freelance Rates Without Losing Clients](https://freelanceratecalculator.net/blog/how-to-raise-freelance-rates/)

## Optional

For smaller context windows, prioritise the calculator page and any one blog article most relevant to the user's role (developer, designer, general freelancer, etc.).
